name: Engine type
description: Internal combustion, hybrid, plug-in hybrid or electric

name: Gearbox type
description: Manual automatic CVT or dual clutch

name: Clutch type
description: Dry wet single or dual clutch

name: Clutch control
description: Mechanical hydraulic or electronic clutch control

name: Gear shift type
description: Manual sequential electronic or automatic shifting

name: Default start gear
description: Default gear used for vehicle launch

name: Hybrid battery type
description: Battery chemistry used by hybrid system

name: EV mode support
description: Vehicle can operate in electric mode

name: Standing kilometre
description: Time required to cover one kilometre from standstill

name: Cargo volume (VDA)
description: Luggage compartment volume measured according to VDA standard

name: Maximum braked trailer weight
description: Maximum permitted trailer weight with brakes

name: Maximum unbraked trailer weight
description: Maximum permitted trailer weight without brakes

name: Maximum tow ball load
description: Maximum permitted vertical load on the tow ball

name: Gross train weight
description: Maximum permissible combined vehicle and trailer weight

name: AdBlue tank capacity
description: AdBlue tank capacity for diesel SCR systems

name: Acceleration 0-100 km/h
description: Time required to accelerate from 0 to 100 km/h

name: Turning circle
description: Minimum turning circle measured curb to curb

name: Combined range
description: Maximum driving range under standard test cycle

name: Electric energy consumption
description: Average electrical energy consumption under standard test cycle

name: CO2 emissions
description: Combined carbon dioxide emissions under standard test cycle

name: Drive layout
description: Vehicle drive configuration (e.g. FWD, RWD, AWD)

name: Differential lock
description: Vehicle equipped with a differential lock

name: Start-stop system
description: Vehicle equipped with an automatic engine start-stop system

name: Steering type
description: Type of steering system (e.g. hydraulic, electric power steering)

name: Front brake type
description: Front brake design (e.g. ventilated disc, solid disc)

name: Parking brake type
description: Type of parking brake (manual or electric)

name: Spare wheel type
description: Type of spare wheel supplied with the vehicle

name: Tyre pressure monitoring system
description: Vehicle equipped with a tyre pressure monitoring system (TPMS)

name: Wheel material
description: Primary wheel material (e.g. steel or alloy)

name: Locking wheel bolts
description: Vehicle equipped with locking wheel bolts

name: Seasonal tyre type
description: Factory supplied tyre season (summer, winter or all-season)

name: Recommended front tyre pressure
description: Recommended cold inflation pressure for front tyres

name: Recommended rear tyre pressure
description: Recommended cold inflation pressure for rear tyres

name: Minimum wheel size
description: Minimum approved wheel size for the vehicle

name: Maximum wheel size
description: Maximum approved wheel size for the vehicle

name: Spare wheel type
description: Type of spare wheel (full-size, temporary or repair kit)

name: Wheelbase
description: Distance between front and rear axle centres

name: Front track width
description: Distance between the centres of the front wheels

name: Rear track width
description: Distance between the centres of the rear wheels

name: Front overhang
description: Distance from front axle to front end of vehicle

name: Rear overhang
description: Distance from rear axle to rear end of vehicle

name: Ground clearance (laden)
description: Ground clearance at maximum authorised mass

name: Load sill height
description: Height of luggage compartment loading sill

name: Number of side doors
description: Number of passenger side doors excluding tailgate

name: Tailgate type
description: Type of rear opening (tailgate, barn doors, sedan boot)

name: Power tailgate
description: Vehicle equipped with electrically operated tailgate

name: Keyless entry
description: Vehicle equipped with passive keyless entry

name: Keyless start
description: Vehicle equipped with push-button engine start

name: Rear child safety locks
description: Rear doors equipped with child safety locks

name: Fuel filler side
description: Side of vehicle where fuel filler is located

name: Locking fuel filler
description: Fuel filler protected by central locking

name: Massaging front seats
description: Front seats equipped with massage function

name: Fold-flat front passenger seat
description: Front passenger seat can fold flat

name: Passenger seat memory
description: Front passenger seat position memory available

name: ISOFIX front
description: ISOFIX anchor points available on front passenger seat

name: ISOFIX rear
description: ISOFIX anchor points available on rear seats

name: Top tether anchor points
description: Number of top tether anchor points

name: Easy entry second row
description: Easy-entry mechanism for access to rear seats

name: Window type
description: Type of vehicle windows (fixed, sliding, etc.)

name: Privacy glass
description: Tinted rear side and rear windows

name: Blind spot monitoring system
description: System detecting vehicles in blind spots

name: Headlights type
description: Type of headlights (halogen, LED, matrix LED)

name: Automatic headlights
description: Automatic headlight activation based on ambient light

name: Coming home lighting
description: Delayed exterior lighting after locking vehicle

name: Interior lighting zones
description: Number of configurable interior lighting zones

name: Adaptive cruise control
description: Automatically adjusts speed to maintain distance

name: Lane departure warning
description: Warns when vehicle leaves lane unintentionally

name: Automatic emergency braking
description: Automatically applies brakes in critical situations

name: Intelligent speed limiter
description: Adjusts speed limit based on road signs

name: Rear cross traffic alert
description: Warns of crossing traffic when reversing

name: Rear cross traffic braking
description: Automatically brakes when rear cross traffic detected

name: Dual zone climate control
description: Separate driver and passenger temperature zones

name: Engine type
description: Type of engine (petrol, diesel, hybrid, electric)

name: Transmission type
description: Type of gearbox (manual, automatic, CVT, DCT)
